title: draba rectifructa
intro: Draba rectifructa, also known as Draba rectifructa, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Draba rectifructa include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Draba rectifructa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile addition to traditional medicine practices.
